credit: Spicy Never-Have-I-Ever prompts authored for Party Cube (inspired by MIT-licensed party-game-sentences).

items.text: Never have I ever sent a text I instantly regretted.
Never have I ever had a crush on a friend's partner.
Never have I ever stalked an ex's new partner online.
Never have I ever kissed someone in this room (or wanted to).
Never have I ever lied about my age to impress someone.
Never have I ever pretended to like something to get a date.
Never have I ever snuck out for a hookup.
Never have I ever been caught checking someone out.
Never have I ever sent a flirty text to the wrong person.
Never have I ever dated two people at the same time.
Never have I ever faked being busy to avoid a date.
Never have I ever gone back to an ex I swore I was done with.
Never have I ever had a 'situationship' I couldn't explain.
Never have I ever rehearsed a text before sending it.
Never have I ever kissed someone on a first date.
Never have I ever screenshotted a DM to send to friends.
Never have I ever lied about why I was late to a date.
Never have I ever had a crush on a coworker.
Never have I ever sent a thirst trap.
Never have I ever cried over someone I never even dated.
Never have I ever ghosted someone and felt zero guilt.
Never have I ever flirted my way out of trouble.
Never have I ever made a move and got completely rejected.
Never have I ever pretended a date was 'just friends'.
Never have I ever kept someone on read for days on purpose.
Never have I ever had a wild story I can't tell my parents.
Never have I ever swiped on someone I knew in real life.
Never have I ever regretted a hookup the next morning.
